vibe_report.summary: A calm, family-forward Japandi scheme that balances Japanese minimalism with Scandinavian warmth. Use muted warm-neutrals, handcrafted materials and layered natural textures. Prioritize low, horizontal furniture lines, soft daylight, and a restrained palette to keep rooms feeling open and meditative while accommodating a discrete standing-desk work corner for a young family.
vibe_report.palette_rationale: Warm neutral base (creamy whites and soft beiges) anchored by mid-tone oak and caramel woods, with deep charcoal accents for contrast. This palette preserves brightness while delivering the earthy warmth central to Japandi.
vibe_report.lighting_mood: Soft ambient with warm color temperature (2700–3200K). Emphasize diffused morning/late-afternoon sunlight for living/dining; use layered task lighting at the desk and dimmable accent lamps for evening coziness.
textures: low-pile wool rugs with tatami edge
furniture_language: clean, tapered legs and minimal silhouettes
simple built-in storage with flush fronts
styling_rules: Keep surfaces largely decluttered — one or two curated objects per visible surface.
Emphasize horizontal lines and negative space; avoid tall, heavy furniture blocking sightlines.
Layer a neutral textured rug under the seating/dining group to define zones.
Use plants sparingly but at different heights (one mid-floor, one tabletop) to add life.
Desk corner must feel integrated — matching wood tone and minimal accessories.
avoid: high-gloss finishes, bright synthetic colors or neon accents
overly ornate patterns or busy wallpaper
large, high-back sofas and heavy Victorian/ornate furniture styles

room_guidance.headline: Multi-use living + discreet standing-desk work corner
room_guidance.guidance: Arrange a low-profile sofa on a warm oak base facing the patio opening; center a low wooden coffee table and textured rug. Place a compact standing desk in the corner near the large glass door so it receives daylight but remains visually secondary. Use a slim task lamp, a neutral cork/linen pinboard, and a single planter to humanize the desk. Maintain open sightlines to patio.
must_include: rattan pendant or woven lamp near seating
must_avoid: large TV as the visual focal point

room_guidance.headline: Serene, low-height bedroom with warm textiles
room_guidance.guidance: Keep the bed low to the floor with wooden slatted headboard. Use layered linen bedding in warm neutrals and two bedside lamps with soft amber bulbs. Install shallow built-in storage and a single sculptural ceramic on a dresser. Keep window treatments light-filtering linen that still shows the exterior window.
must_include: soft area rug under foot of bed

room_guidance.headline: Compact Japandi dining nook — round table & rattan pendant
room_guidance.guidance: Use a round oak table sized to the small bay to encourage flow. Pair with light-upholstered chairs and hang a single woven rattan pendant centered over the table. Keep table styling minimal — a stoneware vase with a single branch or small arrangement. Ensure natural light from the bay is emphasized; avoid blocking panels.
must_avoid: large pendant cluster that overwhelms the small nook

room_guidance.headline: Compact, quietly functional kitchen — warm cabinetry and open counter
room_guidance.guidance: Keep cabinetry flat-front in a warm wood or soft matte beige. Expose a short open shelf for ceramics and a small plant. Keep counters largely clear; stage one cutting board, a mortar and pestle, and a single ceramic utensil jar. Use under-cabinet warm task lighting.
must_include: flat-front warm wood or matte beige cabinets
must_avoid: stainless-steel heavy industrial appliances dominating the view

room_guidance.headline: Covered patio extension — seamless indoor-outdoor connection
room_guidance.guidance: Stage with a simple teak or oak bench, a low coffee table, and woven floor cushions for casual seating. Add a pair of planters with bamboo or tall grasses to imply privacy. Use natural-fiber textures and keep layout open to allow light spill into living/dining.
must_include: teak bench or low outdoor sofa
two tall planters with grasses or bamboo

room_guidance.headline: Minimal, spa-like bathroom
room_guidance.guidance: Use matte stone or large-format tile, a single wood vanity with vessel sink, and a frameless mirror. Keep towels neutral and folded; add one small plant or eucalyptus bundle. If a small window exists, emphasize soft natural light; otherwise rely on warm recessed lighting and a backlit mirror.
must_include: single potted plant or eucalyptus bundle
must_avoid: visible personal toiletries spread across counters

room_guidance.headline: Light, organized entry with purposeful storage
room_guidance.guidance: Provide a slim bench, a wall hook rail in wood, and a small concealed shoe/storage cabinet. Keep floor area open and visually light — use warm-toned mat and a small basket.

warnings: Measurements are ML-parser estimates for three rooms; confirm large furniture fits against measured walls in production.
Kitchen, bathroom and smaller utility rooms have no measured dims — avoid oversized fixtures and allow clearance in staging.

overall_mood: Warm calm minimalism — daylight, texture and quiet functional moments.
global_style_notes: Keep visual weight low and horizontal across the plan to emphasize openness.
Favor tactile, handcrafted objects over printed patterns.
Integrate the standing desk as a calm work nook that visually matches living finishes.
When showing the patio, frame it as an extension of living with matching materials.
negative_prompt: no bright/neon colors, no heavy ornate furniture, no cluttered counters, no plastic furniture, avoid high-gloss/reflective finishes, no visible brand logos, no exaggerated scale distortions

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Soft warm ambient (2700–3000K). Daylight from the large glass door; use fill from a rattan pendant and a low floor lamp. Desk task lamp with directional warm light.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Open-plan living facing patio. Low-profile light-linen sofa on warm oak base, low rectangular oak coffee table on a neutral wool/tatami-edge rug. Compact standing desk tucked in corner near glass door, slim black-framed task lamp, cork pinboard and one small planter. Rattan pendant above seating area; floor-to-ceiling glazing to patio showing diffused daylight. Materials: light oak, linen, rattan, matte ceramics. Palette: EDE7DF, CBB698, A88461, 6D6A5F as accents. Keep decorations minimal: one stoneware vase on coffee table, two cushions, one throw.
room_plans.video_prompt: Begin with a slow dolly in from the patio door into the living area, pause to show sofa and coffee table composition, drift right to reveal the discreet standing desk corner, linger on task lamp and desk objects, then pull back to show the connection to the dining bay and patio.

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Medium natural light from single window with light-filtering linen curtains; warm bedside lamps for evening shots.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Low wooden bed frame with slatted headboard, layered linen bedding in warm cream/beige tones, small wooden bedside tables with simple ceramic lamps. Soft area rug at foot of bed, single framed print centered above headboard. Materials: oiled oak, linen, matte ceramics. Keep surfaces minimal, one folded throw and two cushions.
room_plans.video_prompt: Static slow zoom across the bed from foot to headboard, pause on texture details in bedding and a bedside lamp, then a soft pan to window showing outside light.

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Warm under-cabinet task lighting and soft ambient ceiling light; emphasize indirect daylight from adjacent dining.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Compact galley/kitchen with flat-front warm wood or matte beige lower cabinets, minimal visible appliances, short open shelf with curated ceramics and a small potted herb. Counter staged with one cutting board, mortar & pestle, and one utensil jar. Materials: matte cabinetry, stone-look countertop, warm wood accents.
room_plans.video_prompt: Orbital pan that starts near the entrance to the kitchen, circles the counter to show open shelf and minimal styling, then ends facing the dining connection.

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Bright natural light through bay; single dimmable woven rattan pendant centered over table for evening mood.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Small bay dining nook with round oak table for four, linen-upholstered chairs, woven rattan pendant centered. Table staged minimally with a matte stoneware vase holding a single branch and two place settings in warm neutrals. Materials: oak, linen, rattan, ceramic.
room_plans.video_prompt: Slow dolly in from the bay window, hover over the table to emphasize pendant and centerpiece, then pull back to show relation to living and patio.

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Strong daylight; for evening shots add warm portable lanterns or dimmable sconces.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Covered patio with teak bench or low outdoor sofa, low coffee table, woven floor cushions and two tall planters with grasses/bamboo. Natural-fibre rug anchors seating. Visual connection to living/dining through wide openings.
room_plans.video_prompt: Aerial drift or slow dolly from exterior into patio, pause on seating vignette and planters, then pull back to show continuity with interior living room.

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Warm recessed lighting with optional backlit mirror; emphasize matte stone textures in close-ups.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Small spa-like bathroom with a single wood vanity, vessel sink, matte stone tile, frameless mirror and neatly folded neutral towels. Small potted plant or eucalyptus bundle for scent implication. Keep styling minimal and tidy.
room_plans.video_prompt: Static zoom to vanity details, focus on vessel sink and towel styling, then quick cut to mirror reflection showing soft lighting.

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Soft ambient with a warm accent lamp or wall sconce; retain natural daylight near entry if present.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Slim wood bench, wall hook rail, small concealed shoe cabinet and woven basket. Keep the floor area clear to show circulation to living.
room_plans.video_prompt: Short static shot from entry showing bench and storage, gentle pan to show circulation path toward living room.

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Even warm ambient light; emphasize clear circulation and minimal decor.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Narrow central hall with soft warm paint, one slim console or built-in niche with a single ceramic and small plant. Keep walls mostly clear to emphasize flow to bedroom/kitchen.
room_plans.video_prompt: Slow linear dolly down the hall showing doors to living/bedroom/kitchen, end on the living room connection.
must_include: one small console or niche item

warnings: Confirm actual door swing clearances and furnishing clearances against measured walls; some non-measured rooms could require scaled-down props.
Standing desk placement relies on window/glass door proximity — if threshold or circulation conflicts exist, relocate desk to adjacent wall while maintaining daylight.
